creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Jan 03, 2007 at 03:15:01PM -0300, M. Araujo wrote:
> Hi Erwin,
> 
> This patch not is necessary, internal function detect FreeBSD and compiling correct.
> 
> 
> Download new shar: http://server3.bon.matrix.com.br/araujo/pub/ports/iozone.shar
> Iozone Log Test: http://server3.bon.matrix.com.br/araujo/pub/ports/iozone.log
> 
Hi again,

This breaks the build of iozone on 4.x.  While 4.11 has EOL at the end
of the month, it would be preferable to fix it if there's a
straightforward fix for this.

See http://people.freebsd.org/~erwin/iozone-3.267.log

Cheers,
-erwin
